positive: A maximalist, yet clean, symmetrical mandala design featuring intertwined botanical elements and celestial motifs. Include stylized moon phases, detailed constellations (like Ursa Major), and lush, stylized jungle leaves (Monstera, fern) rendered in deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and vibrant gold accents. The overall composition should be centered, highly detailed, and suitable for printing on dark fabric. Style: Neo-Victorian linocut meets Art Nouveau. Composition: Circular, symmetrical, highly detailed pattern, perfect for apparel transfer. Lighting: Dramatic, studio lighting emphasizing gold foil texture. Aspect: Emblematic and powerful.
negative: blurry, messy, amateur, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, deformed, low detail, noisy, artifact, grayscale, photorealistic
